title: 🕑Waiting Screen🕒
body:
# 🕒 Waiting Screen Plugin – BossBar & Titles! 🏆

Give your server a professional touch with a waiting screen system that is fully customizable! This plugin manages player waiting before a game or event, featuring an attractive and configurable visual interface.

---

## ✨ Features  

- **📊 Custom BossBar** – Personalize the BossBar with colors, styles, and custom messages.  
- **🏆 Titles & Subtitles** – Display customizable messages with adjustable timing.  
- **⬆️ Dynamic BossBar** – The BossBar updates as players join (only counts non-OP players).  
- **💫 Effects** – Apply potion effects to players while they wait, configurable in `config.yml`.  
- **🔊 Sounds** – Play sound effects when players join or leave the waiting list.  
- **🚷 Movement Restriction** – Enable or disable player movement while in the waiting screen.  

---

## ⚙️ Configuration  

The plugin includes a `config.yml` file where you can customize:  

- 🎨 **BossBar colors and styles**  
- 🏆 **Title and Subtitle messages**  
- ⏳ **Potion effects and duration**  
- 🔊 **Entry and exit sounds**  
- 🚷 **Allow or block player movement** 

---

## 🛠️ Commands

This plugin includes the following commands to help you manage the waiting screen system:

---

### **/waitingscreen**

- **Description**: Shows the list of available commands.  
- **Usage**:  
  - `/waitingscreen` – Displays all the available commands for managing the waiting screen.

---

### **/toggleWaitScreen**

- **Description**: Toggles the waiting screen on or off.  
- **Usage**:  
  - `/toggleWaitScreen` – Activates or deactivates the waiting screen manually.

---

## 🎃 Carved Pumpkin Feature
You can customize the carved pumpkin by adding a custom image. Supported resolutions: 16x16, 32x32, 64x64, 128x128, and 256x256.
We recommend using 64x64, 128x128, or 256x256 for better quality. 🖼️

## 🛠️ How to Use the Texture Pack?
Go to the misc folder inside your texture pack.

Replace the default image with your own custom image.

Rename your image to: pumpkinblur.png 🏷️

You can send the texture pack to your friends so they can install it manually, or set it up directly on your server. 🌍

📥 Texture Pack Download: [https://www.mediafire.com/file/82pmkh8mxtncif5/Custom_Pumpkin_Overlay.zip/file](https://www.mediafire.com/file/82pmkh8mxtncif5/Custom_Pumpkin_Overlay.zip/file)
